title: Vuex for State Management Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of Vuex architecture, State, Getters, Mutations, and Actions.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the primary role of Vuex in a large Vue app?
options: To provide a centralized state management pattern and library for Vue.js applications.
To hide the JavaScript code from the console.
To replace the standard HTML input elements.

questions.question: What is the only way to synchronously change state in a Vuex store?
Which part of the Vuex store should you use for asynchronous operations (like API calls)?
What are 'Getters' in a Vuex store?
options: A way to change the state.
Computed properties for the store (like finding a user by ID).
A part of the initial state configuration.

questions.question: Which modern state management library is the recommended alternative to Vuex for Vue 3?
